# signalfx_customized_auto_detector (Resource)

This resources allows for users to customize existing auto detectors by providing various inputs.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `parent_id` (String) This is the id of the auto detector we are making a customisation of them

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the customized auto detector.
- `filters` (Attributes List) The list of filters to be added to the customized auto detector. By default, there will be no additional filters added to the original auto detector. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--filters))
- `inputs` (Map of String) The map of inputs to be added to the customized auto detector. What inputs are required depends on the inherited auto detector.
- `name` (String) The name of the customized auto detector.
- `notifications` (Attributes List) The list of notifications to be added to the customized auto detector. By default, there will be no additional notifications added to the original auto detector. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notifications))
- `severity` (String) The severity of the customized auto detector. By default, the severity will be the same as the original auto detector.
- `tags` (List of String) The list of tags to be added to the customized auto detector. By default, there will be no additional tags added to the original auto detector.
- `teams` (List of String) The list of teams to be added to the customized auto detector. By default, there will be no additional teams added to the original auto detector.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the resource.

<a id="nestedatt--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filters`

Required:

- `key` (String) The key of the filter.
- `values` (List of String) The values of the filter.


<a id="nestedatt--notifications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notifications`

Required:

- `type` (String) This is the name of the integration type that the notification should be routed through.

Optional:

- `channel` (String) The channel to send the notification to. Only used for Slack notification types.
- `credential_id` (String) The ID of the credential to use for this notification.
- `credential_name` (String) The name of the credential to use for this notification. Only used for Team notification types.
- `email` (String) The email address to send the notification to. Only used for Email and TeamEmail notification types.
- `responder_id` (String) The ID of the responder to send the notification to. Only used for Team notification types.
- `responder_name` (String) The name of the responder to send the notification to. Only used for Team notification types.
- `responder_type` (String) The type of the responder to send the notification to. Only used for Team notification types.
- `routing_key` (String) The routing key to use for this notification. Only used for Splunk OnCall (formerly VictorOps) notification types.
- `secret` (String) The secret to use for this notification. Only used for Webhook notification types.
- `team` (String) The team to send the notification to. Only used for Team notification types.
- `url` (String) The URL to send the notification to. Only used for Webhook notification types.
